title: oxyacantha rugosa
intro: Oxyacantha rugosa, also known as the rough-leaved dogwood or hawthorn, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a vasodilator and having anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxyacantha rugosa include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the overall well-being of the heart and cardiovascular system. Herbal preparations of Oxyacantha rugosa typically include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and alleviate symptoms of hypertension and cardiovascular disease.
